nodes.name: Sericornis
nodes.summary: Sericornis（Sericornis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联7种鸟类，如Tasmanian scrubwren、白眉丝刺莺、Spotted scrubwren等7种鸟类。

nodes.name: Atherton scrubwren
nodes.summary: Atherton scrubwren（Sericornis keri）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Atherton scrubwren。

nodes.name: Atherton scrubwren
nodes.summary: The Atherton scrubwren (Sericornis keri) is a bird species. Placed in the family Pardalotidae in the Sibley-Ahlquist taxonomy, this has met with opposition and indeed is now known to be wrong; they rather belong to the independent family Acanthizidae. It is endemic to Queensland (south-eastern coasts of Cape York Peninsula). Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
